title: KubeJS Offline
description: KubeJS Documentation files, generated dynamically via command, accessed with an HTML page.
body:
### Wouldn't it be nice to have one place to find all your events?

### Wouldn't it be nice to be able to have all the properties of an event for any given event?

## This is the goal of KubeJS Offline.
#### To provide all the type-related data that you would ever need for KubeJS in the form of a single html file.
 

To get started, all you have to do is run the `/kubejsoffline` command inside of a single-player world. The html file can be found in the `/<instance>/kubejs/documentation` folder, which is created automatically after a successful run. You can also open the file by clicking the link in the chat when it is finished generating.

# Want to see if this mod is for you? Preview what it generates here:
#### Forge 1.19.2: https://hunter19823.github.io/kubejsoffline/1.19.2/forge/
#### Fabric 1.19.2: https://hunter19823.github.io/kubejsoffline/1.19.2/fabric/
#### Forge 1.18.2: https://hunter19823.github.io/kubejsoffline/1.18.2/forge/
#### Fabric 1.18.2: https://hunter19823.github.io/kubejsoffline/1.18.2/fabric/
